headline: UP CEO confident rail merger application checks all the STB’s boxes
summary: The CEO of Union Pacific said he is confident the revised UP-Norfolk Southern merger application will be accepted by the Surface Transportation Board. The post UP CEO confident rail merger application checks all the STB’s boxes appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Norfolk Southern Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Norfolk Southern has outperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: The U.S. freight network is broken by design. One merger could start fixing it
summary: The Union Pacific–Norfolk Southern merger deserves scrutiny but also serious consideration, because the alternative is a system never built to work.
